name: Exterior / Yard
purpose: Arrival view — facade signage, fenced CCTV yard, 3 sectional doors, 2 docks + ramp.
contents: Deep-green OnDemand facade + monument signage, parking, palms, E11-side approach.

name: 1. Reception
purpose: Double-height arrival space and brand moment for visitors.
contents: Walnut + acoustic-slat hero wall, backlit deep-green OnDemand logo, reception desk, coffee bar, greenery.

name: 2. Engineering Floor
purpose: Open AI engineering workspace — the core build floor.
contents: Oak standing desks on black steel, monitor arrays, full-width visualization wall, warm LED pendants.

name: 3. Library
purpose: Quiet reading and research room for the talent hub.
contents: Full-height walnut shelving with book rows, oak reading tables, warm shelf-edge LED lighting, OnDemand Library wayfinding.

name: 4. Drone Testing Hall
purpose: Indoor drone flight testing under the full 7 m eaves.
contents: Netted flight cage 6.0 x 8.0 x 6.5 m, pilot console, safety floor markings.

name: 5. AI Command Centre
purpose: Mission-control style monitoring of agents, robots and infrastructure.
contents: Curved multi-panel monitor wall, operator consoles, dark finish.

name: 6. Executive Wing
contents: Three glass-walled cells, walnut desks, quiet finishes.

name: 7. Client Experience Centre
purpose: Client experience centre for government / enterprise demos.
contents: Long walnut table, presentation wall, glass front, #0B3D2E brand moments.

name: 8. Cafe
purpose: Premium cafe and social heart of the talent hub.
contents: Walnut counter, oak acoustic slat feature wall, round tables.

name: 9. Gym & Wellness
purpose: Fitness and recovery for the resident team.
contents: Mirror wall, treadmills, functional rig, mats.

name: 10. Hardware Storage
purpose: Hardware storage and fabrication next to the loading docks.

name: 11. Boxing Ring
purpose: Combat-sport training zone — part of the wellness offer.
contents: 6.1 x 6.1 m ring, deep-green canvas with white OnDemand wordmark, green ropes + corner pads, 2 heavy bags on black steel, walnut spectator bench, 2 m painted clearance.

name: 12. Sleep Pods
purpose: Boat-cabin style rest block for 8 people (crunch nights, night ops).
contents: 8 capsule pods as 4 stacked pairs (2.1 x 1.1 x 1.1 m each), walnut cladding, oak interiors, black-steel ladders, deep-green privacy curtains, OnDemand headboard logos.

name: 13. Robotics Studio
purpose: Precision robotics build studio — finishing, tuning, demos-prep.
contents: Oak-top heavy benches on black steel, brushed-aluminium pegboard tool wall, 4 robot charging docks, walnut cabinetry, deep-green branding.

name: 14. Basketball Half-Court
contents: Oak sports floor, deep-green key + 3-pt arc, green centre decal with white OnDemand logo, wall-mounted hoop on black steel, walnut bleacher.

name: 15. Compute Core
purpose: Mini data centre powering on-prem inference and robotics compute.
contents: 12 black server racks in 2 rows, cool-blue LED interior, full-height glass wall with black steel frames, OnDemand — COMPUTE CORE etched glass.

name: 16. Mezzanine Office
purpose: Confirmed 95 sqm office level at +3.5 m — front-of-house admin.
contents: Walnut desks, glass balustrade, stair access.
